title: eurybia saxicastellii
intro: Eurybia saxicastellii, also known as Saxifrage or Saxifrage Saxatilis, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Saxifragaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help to soothe and protect the skin. The health benefits of Eurybia saxicastellii include reducing swelling and pain, as well as promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to treat minor cuts, scrapes, and burns.
